title: Studies on the Co-ordination Chemistry of Rhenium: Part I. Methylation of Cyano-Rhenates (II)
author: Sabyasachi Sarkar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The paper describes the isolation and study of certain methylated products of Re(II)-cyano derivatives. Two apparently isomeric compounds of the composition [(CH 3 CN) 4  Re(CN) 2 ] and the salts of the ion [Re(CH 3 CN) 5 (H 2 O)] ++  were isolated. They are ordinarily quite stable compounds and resemble the corresponding Fe(II) compounds.
steps_raw: The paper describes the isolation and study of certain methylated products of Re(II)-cyano derivatives. Two apparently isomeric compounds of the composition [(CH 3 CN) 4  Re(CN) 2 ] and the salts of the ion [Re(CH 3 CN) 5 (H 2 O)] ++  were isolated. They are ordinarily quite stable compounds and resemble the corresponding Fe(II) compounds.
